TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Amis Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://ami.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_ami, title = {Amis Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://ami.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: Kasa'etal no Pangcah Makilalima kasa'etal ko Pangcah ira ko 'Amisan a 'etal, Siwkolang a 'etal, Pasawali a 'etal, Falangaw a 'etal ato Palidaw a 'etal, onini pisakilac midoedoay to pala ato kahiceraan no kafolaw a niyaro' koni, caayay ko serangawan, o caciyaw, o tatirengan ko pisakilac, mato o sowal noya cifenekay no Dipong ci 伊能嘉矩, " O sakamatini ko pisakilac, o sakalahoday aca pakafana, caayay pakino tamdawan ko pinengneng, kitini han i pala mihalaka mitayal." O matiniay ko pisakilac, sarakat i pinana'ang a tilid i 1899 a miheca ci 伊能嘉矩 ato ci 粟野傳之丞 nisanga'an " O demak no Pangcah i Taywan." a codad, ira masowal, "O sakalahoday a pakafana', sa pacarcar sa makilalima ko kasafinacadan , (1)Palidaw Pangcah. (2)Falangaw Pangcah, (3)Pasawali Pangcah, (4)Siwkolang Pangcah, (5)Cilay Pangcah." Nika tahira to i 1914 a miheca, ci fenekay no Dipong ci 佐山融吉 ni tilidan nangra a codad, pakaynien nangra i serangawan malikatolo ko pisakilac, ira ko 'amis, sasifo'an, satimolan, nika itini sa'amisan ira ho ko micidekay itiniay maro' i Rinahem, ka'amis no ciyakan a 'alo, oni kamaro'an no 'Amisan a 'etal, pangangan han cangra Pangcah satimolan, ira ko Natawlan, Pokpok, Lidaw tolo a niyaro'. I 1935 a miheca cifenekay no Dipong ci 移川子之藏, 馬淵東一 ato ci 宮本延人 nisanga'an nangra a codad sowal sa, to kinapinaan a miciyosa ko paranaan, miliyaw haca pakipalaen to kasasiroma ko pisakilac nangra, 'Amis a 'etal "O ka'amis, " Siwkolang a 'etal " Kaetip no pasawali a lotok tora sasifo'an",Pasawali a 'etal " I kawali no pasawali a lotok a sasifoan" Falangaw a 'etal "Nai Madawdaw talatimol tangasa i masadafdafay no Posong", Palidaw a 'etel "Itini i Palidaw no Pintong" makilalimaay kasa'etal. Tongod to tahira i 1941 a miheca, ci fenekay no Dipong ci 鹿野忠雄 pisakilac nira, palacecay hanira ko nisilsilan no i'ayaway ko pisakilac, ona Pangcah sakilac hanira, Ka'amis o 'Amis a 'etal, sifo'ay marapot ko Siwkolang a 'etal Pasawali a 'etal, timol a 'etal ira ko Falangaw ato Palidaw. Ano doedoen pakaynien toni a pala ko pisilsil i, o kamaro'an no 'Amisan a 'etal nai sa'amisan i Hopo no Paepo talatimol tahira i 'alo no Rinahem, marapot ko Hopo, Cikaso'an, Rinahem Fakong ato Kalingko Holin. Nawhan matatapal to sa'amisan no Tayan, itira i satimolan ko inain, orasaka satimolan Pangcah han ko pangangan, malikatolo ho kasarayray, no Sakilaya a rayray i tosa ko safaw ko nyaro', ira ko Sakor, Pawkan, Karoroan, Cirakayay, Ma'ifor, Copo', Sinsya, Parik, Towapon, Katangka, Kalingan, Paypo. Fanaw, Ci'adetomay No Cikasowan a rayray i marapot ko Mafowakay, Cikasowan, Fanaw, Ci'adetomay, Rinahem, Ci'alopalay ato Kiko, Saakatolo a rayray i marapot ko Natawran, Pokpok, Lidaw, Tomay, Ciwidian, Dawlik ato Cihafayan. Nika, ano matinitini paki'etal ko pisilsil i, mapangangan sa makilalima, nika pakayni i serangawan i ira ko caay kalalecad tona laloma', itini i tapang no rayray, o kafolaw no finacadan a rakat, no kasasiroma ato saka'orip, o pidefon a 'icel no kanatal ato sakatatodong no pala maemin mararangirangi, malasaka- tadamaan no kasa'etal konini. Samanen a mifana' to ka tadamaan no kasa'etel padefongen itini to nisafaloco'an no finacadan, ta mangaay a mirayray a mikadkad ta mahapinang koni a demak.
S.PHON: kasaʡətaɾ no~u paŋʦaħ makiɾaɾima kasaʡətaɾ ko~u paŋʦaħ ira ko~u ʡamisan a ʡətaɾ, siwko~uɾaŋ a ʡətaɾ, pasawaɾi a ʡətaɾ, faɾaŋaw a ʡətaɾ ato~u paɾiɬ~ɮaw a ʡətaɾ, o~unini pisakiɾaʦ miɬ~ɮo~uəɬ~ɮo~uaj to~u paɾa ato~u kaħiʦəraan no~u kafo~uɾaw a nijaro~uʡ ko~uni, ʦaajaj ko~u səraŋawan, o~u ʦaʦijaw, o~u tatirəŋan ko~u pisakiɾaʦ, mato~u o~u so~uwaɾ no~uja ʦifənəkaj no~u ɬ~ɮipo~uŋ ʦi ****, " o~u sakamatini ko~u pisakiɾaʦ, o~u sakaɾaħo~uɬ~ɮaj aʦa pakafana, ʦaajaj pakino~u tamɬ~ɮawan ko~u pinəŋnəŋ, kitini ħan i paɾa miħaɾaka mitajaɾ." o~u matiniaj ko~u pisakiɾaʦ, sarakat i pinanaʡaŋ a tiɾiɬ~ɮ i **** a miħəʦa ʦi **** ato~u ʦi ***** nisaŋaʡan " o~u ɬ~ɮəmak no~u paŋʦaħ i tajwan." a ʦo~uɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮ, ira maso~uwaɾ, "o~u sakaɾaħo~uɬ~ɮaj a pakafanaʡ, sa paʦarʦar sa makiɾaɾima ko~u kasafinaʦaɬ~ɮan , (*)paɾiɬ~ɮaw paŋʦaħ. (*)faɾaŋaw paŋʦaħ, (*)pasawaɾi paŋʦaħ, (*)siwko~uɾaŋ paŋʦaħ, (*)ʦiɾaj paŋʦaħ." nika taħira to~u i **** a miħəʦa, ʦi fənəkaj no~u ɬ~ɮipo~uŋ ʦi **** ni tiɾiɬ~ɮan naŋra a ʦo~uɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮ, pakajniən naŋra i səraŋawan maɾikato~uɾo~u ko~u pisakiɾaʦ, ira ko~u ʡamis, sasifo~uʡan, satimo~uɾan, nika itini saʡamisan ira ħo~u ko~u miʦiɬ~ɮəkaj itiniaj maro~uʡ i rinaħəm, kaʡamis no~u ʦijakan a ʡaɾo~u, o~uni kamaro~uʡan no~u ʡamisan a ʡətaɾ, paŋaŋan ħan ʦaŋra paŋʦaħ satimo~uɾan, ira ko~u natawɾan, po~ukpo~uk, ɾiɬ~ɮaw to~uɾo~u a nijaro~uʡ. i **** a miħəʦa ʦifənəkaj no~u ɬ~ɮipo~uŋ ʦi *****, **** ato~u ʦi **** nisaŋaʡan naŋra a ʦo~uɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮ so~uwaɾ sa, to~u kinapinaan a miʦijo~usa ko~u paranaan, miɾijaw ħaʦa pakipaɾaən to~u kasasiro~uma ko~u pisakiɾaʦ naŋra, ʡamis a ʡətaɾ "o~u kaʡamis, " siwko~uɾaŋ a ʡətaɾ " kaətip no~u pasawaɾi a ɾo~uto~uk to~ura sasifo~uʡan",pasawaɾi a ʡətaɾ " i kawaɾi no~u pasawaɾi a ɾo~uto~uk a sasifo~uan" faɾaŋaw a ʡətaɾ "nai maɬ~ɮawɬ~ɮaw taɾatimo~uɾ taŋasa i masaɬ~ɮafɬ~ɮafaj no~u po~uso~uŋ", paɾiɬ~ɮaw a ʡətəɾ "itini i paɾiɬ~ɮaw no~u pinto~uŋ" makiɾaɾimaaj kasaʡətaɾ. to~uŋo~uɬ~ɮ to~u taħira i **** a miħəʦa, ʦi fənəkaj no~u ɬ~ɮipo~uŋ ʦi **** pisakiɾaʦ nira, paɾaʦəʦaj ħanira ko~u nisiɾsiɾan no~u iʡajawaj ko~u pisakiɾaʦ, o~una paŋʦaħ sakiɾaʦ ħanira, kaʡamis o~u ʡamis a ʡətaɾ, sifo~uʡaj marapo~ut ko~u siwko~uɾaŋ a ʡətaɾ pasawaɾi a ʡətaɾ, timo~uɾ a ʡətaɾ ira ko~u faɾaŋaw ato~u paɾiɬ~ɮaw. ano~u ɬ~ɮo~uəɬ~ɮo~uən pakajniən to~uni a paɾa ko~u pisiɾsiɾ i, o~u kamaro~uʡan no~u ʡamisan a ʡətaɾ nai saʡamisan i ħo~upo~u no~u paəpo~u taɾatimo~uɾ taħira i ʡaɾo~u no~u rinaħəm, marapo~ut ko~u ħo~upo~u, ʦikaso~uʡan, rinaħəm fako~uŋ ato~u kaɾiŋko~u ħo~uɾin. nawħan matatapaɾ to~u saʡamisan no~u tajan, itira i satimo~uɾan ko~u inain, o~urasaka satimo~uɾan paŋʦaħ ħan ko~u paŋaŋan, maɾikato~uɾo~u ħo~u kasarajraj, no~u sakiɾaja a rajraj i to~usa ko~u safaw ko~u njaro~uʡ, ira ko~u sako~ur, pawkan, karo~uro~uan, ʦirakajaj, maʡifo~ur, ʦo~upo~uʡ, sinsja, parik, to~uwapo~un, kataŋka, kaɾiŋan, pajpo~u. fanaw, ʦiʡaɬ~ɮəto~umaj no~u ʦikaso~uwan a rajraj i marapo~ut ko~u mafo~uwakaj, ʦikaso~uwan, fanaw, ʦiʡaɬ~ɮəto~umaj, rinaħəm, ʦiʡaɾo~upaɾaj ato~u kiko~u, saakato~uɾo~u a rajraj i marapo~ut ko~u natawran, po~ukpo~uk, ɾiɬ~ɮaw, to~umaj, ʦiwiɬ~ɮian, ɬ~ɮawɾik ato~u ʦiħafajan. nika, ano~u matinitini pakiʡətaɾ ko~u pisiɾsiɾ i, mapaŋaŋan sa makiɾaɾima, nika pakajni i səraŋawan i ira ko~u ʦaaj kaɾaɾəʦaɬ~ɮ to~una ɾaɾo~umaʡ, itini i tapaŋ no~u rajraj, o~u kafo~uɾaw no~u finaʦaɬ~ɮan a rakat, no~u kasasiro~uma ato~u sakaʡo~urip, o~u piɬ~ɮəfo~un a ʡiʦəɾ no~u kanataɾ ato~u sakatato~uɬ~ɮo~uŋ no~u paɾa maəmin mararaŋiraŋi, maɾasaka- taɬ~ɮamaan no~u kasaʡətaɾ ko~unini. samanən a mifanaʡ to~u ka taɬ~ɮamaan no~u kasaʡətəɾ paɬ~ɮəfo~uŋən itini to~u nisafaɾo~uʦo~uʡan no~u finaʦaɬ~ɮan, ta maŋaaj a mirajraj a mikaɬ~ɮkaɬ~ɮ ta maħapinaŋ ko~uni a ɬ~ɮəmak.
S.FORM: Kasa'etal no Pangcah Makilalima kasa'etal ko Pangcah ira ko 'Amisan a 'etal, Siwkolang a 'etal, Pasawali a 'etal, Falangaw a 'etal ato Palidaw a 'etal, onini pisakilac midoedoay to pala ato kahiceraan no kafolaw a niyaro' koni, caayay ko serangawan, o caciyaw, o tatirengan ko pisakilac, mato o sowal noya cifenekay no Dipong ci 伊能嘉矩, " O sakamatini ko pisakilac, o sakalahoday aca pakafana, caayay pakino tamdawan ko pinengneng, kitini han i pala mihalaka mitayal." O matiniay ko pisakilac, sarakat i pinana'ang a tilid i 1899 a miheca ci 伊能嘉矩 ato ci 粟野傳之丞 nisanga'an " O demak no Pangcah i Taywan." a codad, ira masowal, "O sakalahoday a pakafana', sa pacarcar sa makilalima ko kasafinacadan , (1)Palidaw Pangcah. (2)Falangaw Pangcah, (3)Pasawali Pangcah, (4)Siwkolang Pangcah, (5)Cilay Pangcah." Nika tahira to i 1914 a miheca, ci fenekay no Dipong ci 佐山融吉 ni tilidan nangra a codad, pakaynien nangra i serangawan malikatolo ko pisakilac, ira ko 'amis, sasifo'an, satimolan, nika itini sa'amisan ira ho ko micidekay itiniay maro' i Rinahem, ka'amis no ciyakan a 'alo, oni kamaro'an no 'Amisan a 'etal, pangangan han cangra Pangcah satimolan, ira ko Natawlan, Pokpok, Lidaw tolo a niyaro'. I 1935 a miheca cifenekay no Dipong ci 移川子之藏, 馬淵東一 ato ci 宮本延人 nisanga'an nangra a codad sowal sa, to kinapinaan a miciyosa ko paranaan, miliyaw haca pakipalaen to kasasiroma ko pisakilac nangra, 'Amis a 'etal "O ka'amis, " Siwkolang a 'etal " Kaetip no pasawali a lotok tora sasifo'an",Pasawali a 'etal " I kawali no pasawali a lotok a sasifoan" Falangaw a 'etal "Nai Madawdaw talatimol tangasa i masadafdafay no Posong", Palidaw a 'etel "Itini i Palidaw no Pintong" makilalimaay kasa'etal. Tongod to tahira i 1941 a miheca, ci fenekay no Dipong ci 鹿野忠雄 pisakilac nira, palacecay hanira ko nisilsilan no i'ayaway ko pisakilac, ona Pangcah sakilac hanira, Ka'amis o 'Amis a 'etal, sifo'ay marapot ko Siwkolang a 'etal Pasawali a 'etal, timol a 'etal ira ko Falangaw ato Palidaw. Ano doedoen pakaynien toni a pala ko pisilsil i, o kamaro'an no 'Amisan a 'etal nai sa'amisan i Hopo no Paepo talatimol tahira i 'alo no Rinahem, marapot ko Hopo, Cikaso'an, Rinahem Fakong ato Kalingko Holin. Nawhan matatapal to sa'amisan no Tayan, itira i satimolan ko inain, orasaka satimolan Pangcah han ko pangangan, malikatolo ho kasarayray, no Sakilaya a rayray i tosa ko safaw ko nyaro', ira ko Sakor, Pawkan, Karoroan, Cirakayay, Ma'ifor, Copo', Sinsya, Parik, Towapon, Katangka, Kalingan, Paypo. Fanaw, Ci'adetomay No Cikasowan a rayray i marapot ko Mafowakay, Cikasowan, Fanaw, Ci'adetomay, Rinahem, Ci'alopalay ato Kiko, Saakatolo a rayray i marapot ko Natawran, Pokpok, Lidaw, Tomay, Ciwidian, Dawlik ato Cihafayan. Nika, ano matinitini paki'etal ko pisilsil i, mapangangan sa makilalima, nika pakayni i serangawan i ira ko caay kalalecad tona laloma', itini i tapang no rayray, o kafolaw no finacadan a rakat, no kasasiroma ato saka'orip, o pidefon a 'icel no kanatal ato sakatatodong no pala maemin mararangirangi, malasaka- tadamaan no kasa'etal konini. Samanen a mifana' to ka tadamaan no kasa'etel padefongen itini to nisafaloco'an no finacadan, ta mangaay a mirayray a mikadkad ta mahapinang koni a demak.
S.PHON: kasaʡətaɾ no~u paŋʦaħ makiɾaɾima kasaʡətaɾ ko~u paŋʦaħ ira ko~u ʡamisan a ʡətaɾ, siwko~uɾaŋ a ʡətaɾ, pasawaɾi a ʡətaɾ, faɾaŋaw a ʡətaɾ ato~u paɾiɬ~ɮaw a ʡətaɾ, o~unini pisakiɾaʦ miɬ~ɮo~uəɬ~ɮo~uaj to~u paɾa ato~u kaħiʦəraan no~u kafo~uɾaw a nijaro~uʡ ko~uni, ʦaajaj ko~u səraŋawan, o~u ʦaʦijaw, o~u tatirəŋan ko~u pisakiɾaʦ, mato~u o~u so~uwaɾ no~uja ʦifənəkaj no~u ɬ~ɮipo~uŋ ʦi ****, " o~u sakamatini ko~u pisakiɾaʦ, o~u sakaɾaħo~uɬ~ɮaj aʦa pakafana, ʦaajaj pakino~u tamɬ~ɮawan ko~u pinəŋnəŋ, kitini ħan i paɾa miħaɾaka mitajaɾ." o~u matiniaj ko~u pisakiɾaʦ, sarakat i pinanaʡaŋ a tiɾiɬ~ɮ i **** a miħəʦa ʦi **** ato~u ʦi ***** nisaŋaʡan " o~u ɬ~ɮəmak no~u paŋʦaħ i tajwan." a ʦo~uɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮ, ira maso~uwaɾ, "o~u sakaɾaħo~uɬ~ɮaj a pakafanaʡ, sa paʦarʦar sa makiɾaɾima ko~u kasafinaʦaɬ~ɮan , (*)paɾiɬ~ɮaw paŋʦaħ. (*)faɾaŋaw paŋʦaħ, (*)pasawaɾi paŋʦaħ, (*)siwko~uɾaŋ paŋʦaħ, (*)ʦiɾaj paŋʦaħ." nika taħira to~u i **** a miħəʦa, ʦi fənəkaj no~u ɬ~ɮipo~uŋ ʦi **** ni tiɾiɬ~ɮan naŋra a ʦo~uɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮ, pakajniən naŋra i səraŋawan maɾikato~uɾo~u ko~u pisakiɾaʦ, ira ko~u ʡamis, sasifo~uʡan, satimo~uɾan, nika itini saʡamisan ira ħo~u ko~u miʦiɬ~ɮəkaj itiniaj maro~uʡ i rinaħəm, kaʡamis no~u ʦijakan a ʡaɾo~u, o~uni kamaro~uʡan no~u ʡamisan a ʡətaɾ, paŋaŋan ħan ʦaŋra paŋʦaħ satimo~uɾan, ira ko~u natawɾan, po~ukpo~uk, ɾiɬ~ɮaw to~uɾo~u a nijaro~uʡ. i **** a miħəʦa ʦifənəkaj no~u ɬ~ɮipo~uŋ ʦi *****, **** ato~u ʦi **** nisaŋaʡan naŋra a ʦo~uɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮ so~uwaɾ sa, to~u kinapinaan a miʦijo~usa ko~u paranaan, miɾijaw ħaʦa pakipaɾaən to~u kasasiro~uma ko~u pisakiɾaʦ naŋra, ʡamis a ʡətaɾ "o~u kaʡamis, " siwko~uɾaŋ a ʡətaɾ " kaətip no~u pasawaɾi a ɾo~uto~uk to~ura sasifo~uʡan",pasawaɾi a ʡətaɾ " i kawaɾi no~u pasawaɾi a ɾo~uto~uk a sasifo~uan" faɾaŋaw a ʡətaɾ "nai maɬ~ɮawɬ~ɮaw taɾatimo~uɾ taŋasa i masaɬ~ɮafɬ~ɮafaj no~u po~uso~uŋ", paɾiɬ~ɮaw a ʡətəɾ "itini i paɾiɬ~ɮaw no~u pinto~uŋ" makiɾaɾimaaj kasaʡətaɾ. to~uŋo~uɬ~ɮ to~u taħira i **** a miħəʦa, ʦi fənəkaj no~u ɬ~ɮipo~uŋ ʦi **** pisakiɾaʦ nira, paɾaʦəʦaj ħanira ko~u nisiɾsiɾan no~u iʡajawaj ko~u pisakiɾaʦ, o~una paŋʦaħ sakiɾaʦ ħanira, kaʡamis o~u ʡamis a ʡətaɾ, sifo~uʡaj marapo~ut ko~u siwko~uɾaŋ a ʡətaɾ pasawaɾi a ʡətaɾ, timo~uɾ a ʡətaɾ ira ko~u faɾaŋaw ato~u paɾiɬ~ɮaw. ano~u ɬ~ɮo~uəɬ~ɮo~uən pakajniən to~uni a paɾa ko~u pisiɾsiɾ i, o~u kamaro~uʡan no~u ʡamisan a ʡətaɾ nai saʡamisan i ħo~upo~u no~u paəpo~u taɾatimo~uɾ taħira i ʡaɾo~u no~u rinaħəm, marapo~ut ko~u ħo~upo~u, ʦikaso~uʡan, rinaħəm fako~uŋ ato~u kaɾiŋko~u ħo~uɾin. nawħan matatapaɾ to~u saʡamisan no~u tajan, itira i satimo~uɾan ko~u inain, o~urasaka satimo~uɾan paŋʦaħ ħan ko~u paŋaŋan, maɾikato~uɾo~u ħo~u kasarajraj, no~u sakiɾaja a rajraj i to~usa ko~u safaw ko~u njaro~uʡ, ira ko~u sako~ur, pawkan, karo~uro~uan, ʦirakajaj, maʡifo~ur, ʦo~upo~uʡ, sinsja, parik, to~uwapo~un, kataŋka, kaɾiŋan, pajpo~u. fanaw, ʦiʡaɬ~ɮəto~umaj no~u ʦikaso~uwan a rajraj i marapo~ut ko~u mafo~uwakaj, ʦikaso~uwan, fanaw, ʦiʡaɬ~ɮəto~umaj, rinaħəm, ʦiʡaɾo~upaɾaj ato~u kiko~u, saakato~uɾo~u a rajraj i marapo~ut ko~u natawran, po~ukpo~uk, ɾiɬ~ɮaw, to~umaj, ʦiwiɬ~ɮian, ɬ~ɮawɾik ato~u ʦiħafajan. nika, ano~u matinitini pakiʡətaɾ ko~u pisiɾsiɾ i, mapaŋaŋan sa makiɾaɾima, nika pakajni i səraŋawan i ira ko~u ʦaaj kaɾaɾəʦaɬ~ɮ to~una ɾaɾo~umaʡ, itini i tapaŋ no~u rajraj, o~u kafo~uɾaw no~u finaʦaɬ~ɮan a rakat, no~u kasasiro~uma ato~u sakaʡo~urip, o~u piɬ~ɮəfo~un a ʡiʦəɾ no~u kanataɾ ato~u sakatato~uɬ~ɮo~uŋ no~u paɾa maəmin mararaŋiraŋi, maɾasaka- taɬ~ɮamaan no~u kasaʡətaɾ ko~unini. samanən a mifanaʡ to~u ka taɬ~ɮamaan no~u kasaʡətəɾ paɬ~ɮəfo~uŋən itini to~u nisafaɾo~uʦo~uʡan no~u finaʦaɬ~ɮan, ta maŋaaj a mirajraj a mikaɬ~ɮkaɬ~ɮ ta maħapinaŋ ko~uni a ɬ~ɮəmak.
